sinks.expression: header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0, post-check=0, pre-check=0')
preg_replace('/^CREATE TABLE/', 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS', $createTable)

preg_replace(
				'/\bCREATE\s+(?:OR\s+REPLACE\s+)?(?:SQL\s+SECURITY\s+INVOKER\s+)?VIEW\s+`?([A-Za-z0-9_]+)`?/i',
				'CREATE OR REPLACE SQL SECURITY INVOKER VIEW `' . $newName . '`',
				$ddl,
				1
			)
fwrite($f, "if (!defined( '__JETBACKUP__')) die('Direct access is not allowed');" . PHP_EOL)
preg_replace("#" . preg_quote(JetBackup::SEP) . "+#", JetBackup::SEP, Factory::getLocations()->getDataDir() . JetBackup::SEP . self::IMPORTS_DIR . JetBackup::SEP . parent::getPath())
preg_replace("#" . preg_quote(JetBackup::SEP) . "+#", JetBackup::SEP, Factory::getLocations()->getBackupsDir() . JetBackup::SEP . parent::getPath())
header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0, post-check=0, pre-check=0')

file_put_contents(sprintf(self::META_FILEPATH, $path), json_encode([
			self::VERSION           => self::META_VERSION,
			self::NAME              => $this->getName(),
			self::BACKUP_TYPE       => $this->getBackupType(),
			Engine::ENGINE          => $this->getEngine(),
			self::CONTAINS          => $this->getContains(),
			self::STRUCTURE         => $this->getStructure(),
			self::SCHEDULES         => $this->getSchedules(),
			self::JOB_IDENTIFIER    => $this->getJobIdentifier(),
			self::CREATED           => $this->getCreated(),
			self::SIZE              => $this->getSize(),
			self::PARAMS            => $this->getParams(),
			self::ITEMS             => $items,
		]))

wp_die(
				sprintf(__('This plugin cannot be activated. %s', 'text-domain'), $e->getMessage()),
				__('Plugin Activation Error', 'text-domain'),
				['back_link' => true]
			)

sanitizers.expression: esc_html('JetBackup failed to initialize and was disabled for this request. Reason: ' . $e->getMessage())
